subject: Switch -M virt -kernel to -machine andes_ae350 -bios in negative drivers + plugin scripts
description: DEFERRED until F7 lands. Fix the F0 pre-existing breakage: rt_no_qemu_binary, rt_gdbstub_timeout, rt_pty_handback, test_plugin_drain_exit_code, probe_vcsr_drain currently use -M virt -bios none -kernel against ae350-linked fixtures. Adopt the e2e.sh pattern: 128 MiB /dev/shm mmap, -machine andes_ae350,memory-backend=mem -cpu andes-ax45mpv,vlen=512 -semihosting-config enable=on,target=native -bios, plus --shared-mem-{path,size,base} on the vsim leg.
